positive: A high-contrast, graphic illustration of celestial fauna, featuring a majestic, stylized crescent moon nestled within swirling nebula patterns and elegant, flowing comet tails. The central focus is a single, geometrically perfect star cluster rendered in deep indigo, sapphire blue, and vibrant gold leaf accents. Use thick, clean silhouettes against a limited, impactful color palette of cosmic midnight blue and luminous cyan. The overall composition must be highly symmetrical, centered, and maintain a flat, print-ready aesthetic, reminiscent of celestial map etchings combined with modern vector art. Cinematic lighting, extreme detail, high contrast, designed for apparel printing.
negative: blur, low detail, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyrighted, parody, celebrity, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, messy, out of focus, grayscale only
